title: The $20,000 API Key Mistake
summary: Keith AI presents a case study of a $20,000 incident involving improper API key handling. The video serves as a warning about the financial risks of security mismanagement in AI API usage.
writeup: Keith AI walks through a case study of a $20,000 incident caused by improper API key handling. The video frames the problem as a security and cost-control failure in AI API usage, showing how mismanaged keys translate into direct financial exposure. The takeaway centers on the link between API integration practices and spending risk, and the need for cost controls around key handling.
